pages: The first person to discover the incident was the owner of a toy store on the outskirts of town. He noticed that new toys were missing every morning when he opened the store.
Garu-chan investigates the scene, searching for clues while carrying her child on her back, and works tirelessly to uncover the truth behind the incident.
The toy store owner testifies that he saw a suspicious person before the incident, who was wearing a black coat and a hat.
To investigate the suspicious person's identity, Garu-chan goes around town, gathering information while carrying her child on her back.
A witness comes forward, claiming to have seen the suspicious person. Garu-chan heads to the outskirts of town to meet the witness.
In the residential area, Garu-chan discovers the true identity of the suspicious person. The truth behind the incident exceeds her imagination.
Although the case is solved, Garu-chan is left with new questions. She continues to work hard to protect the truth, all while carrying her child on her back.
